message:
style(fcp-mesh): apply rustfmt to SunnyMoose test code

Post-landing rustfmt check against --edition 2024 flagged two
test-only formatting nits in my earlier patches:
- coordinator.rs should_renew_does_not_panic_on_u64_max_remaining
  assert! was too wide for the line budget
- degraded.rs decoder_rejects_new_pending_beyond_cap frame flags
  expression fit on one line

Pure formatting; no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1217,9 +1217,7 @@ mod tests {
             FcpsFrame {
                 header: FcpsFrameHeader {
                     version: FCPS_VERSION,
-                    flags: FrameFlags::ENCRYPTED
-                        | FrameFlags::RAPTORQ
-                        | FrameFlags::CONTROL_PLANE,
+                    flags: FrameFlags::ENCRYPTED | FrameFlags::RAPTORQ | FrameFlags::CONTROL_PLANE,
                     symbol_count: 1,
                     total_payload_len: wire_size,
                     object_id: ObjectId::from_bytes([object_id_byte; 32]),
